_description: Adversarial fixture for Q3.6-5: a system message containing BOTH `<|think_on|>` and `<|think_off|>` sentinels. Codex adversarial review (2026-05-06) caught that the original Q3.6-5 stripped them in code order (think_off first, then think_on), so think_on always won regardless of textual order. The fix uses rightmost-in-text-wins via rfind position comparison. This fixture places `<|think_on|>` early and `<|think_off|>` late — under the fix, think_off must win and the generation prompt must close thinking.
_bug: Codex adversarial review finding (2026-05-06): Q3.6-5 sentinel processing has implicit precedence baked into code order rather than text position.

messages.content: Default mode <|think_on|> but for THIS request please use <|think_off|>
